Roblox

BEST ROBLOX
GAMES

Ranked by Tam2Real. Top picks + discovery — filter by genre and find your next obsession.

1
⚔️ Adventure · Fighting
BLOX FRUITS
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Massive open world, devil fruits, raids, and PvP that never gets old. One of the biggest games on Roblox — for good reason.
🔥 #1 Ranked 30B+ Visits Stream-Ready
🎮 Play Blox Fruits →
2
👻 Horror · Puzzle
DOORS
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Run through 100 hotel doors while monsters hunt you down. Terrifying, strategic, and perfect for stream reactions.
🎙️ Streamer Fave 8B+ Visits Multiplayer
🎮 Play DOORS →
3
🏙️ Roleplay
BROOKHAVEN
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
The most-played game on all of Roblox. Build your life, drive cars, hang out. No pressure — pure vibes.
👑 Most Played 50B+ Visits Chill Mode
🎮 Play Brookhaven →
4
🔫 Shooter · FPS
ARSENAL
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Gun Game mode done right. Fast-paced, skill-based, and every round is different. Great for competitive stream content.
⚡ Fast-Paced 3B+ Visits Competitive
🎮 Play Arsenal →
5
🏙️ Roleplay · Social
MURDER MYSTERY 2
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Classic murder mystery with knife trading, rare skins, and chaotic gameplay. One of Roblox's all-time legends.
🗡️ Classic 8B+ Visits Trading
🎮 Play MM2 →
6
🏃 Obby · Platformer
TOWER OF HELL
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
No checkpoints. No mercy. Just a neon tower that will break you down and build you back up. Addictive as it gets.
💀 No Checkpoints 14B+ Visits Rage Mode
🎮 Play Tower of Hell →
7
🐾 Simulator
PET SIMULATOR X
⭐⭐⭐⭐
Collect, hatch, and trade pets to build your dream collection. The grind is real and the community is huge.
🥚 Hatching 6B+ Visits Trading
🎮 Play Pet Sim X →
8
🌀 RPG · Anime
SOL'S RNG
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Pure RNG luck-based aura collecting with insane rarity tiers. The whole community is hooked — great for stream moments.
🎲 RNG Trending 2025 Aura Hunt
🎮 Play Sol's RNG →
9
⚔️ Adventure · Survival
NATURAL DISASTER SURVIVAL
⭐⭐⭐⭐
Survive earthquakes, tornadoes, acid rain — classic chaotic Roblox energy. Always a crowd pleaser when playing with friends.
🌪️ Survival 3B+ Visits Squad Goals
🎮 Play NDS →
10
🌀 RPG · Anime
ANIME DIMENSIONS
⭐⭐⭐⭐
Fight legendary anime characters across iconic worlds. If you watch anime and play Roblox — this one's already a W.
🎌 Anime 2B+ Visits Collab Heavy

Blox Fruits · April 2026

FRUIT
VALUES

Real values for Regular and Permanent fruits. Click any card to see the full value page. ⚠️ Use Brave Browser — no ads.

💡 Tam's Trading Strategy
Stop trading the trend — trade the potential. Pick up fruits before their rework drops. Demand spikes overnight when a rework hits. Permanents are always the safest hold — once gone, they never come back.
⭕ Rubber · #1 Priority 🌊 Quake · #2 Priority ☠️ Venom · #3 Priority 🌑 Shadow · #4 Priority
Dragon (East & West) are absolutely insane right now — both sitting Overpaid at 6.87B on Permanent. If you have one, you're winning.

🚨 #2 Rework — BUY & HOLD
⭐ Permanent fruits never expire — they stay with your account forever. Once a permanent is out of the game, it can't be obtained again. That's why permanents always hold higher value and are the safest long-term hold.

Spin it, trade it. No take backs — the wheel picks the opponent, the fruit, and the stakes. Every episode.

The Ecosystem

THE TAM2REAL
ECOSYSTEM

One vision. Multiple lanes. Gaming, trading, food, and tech — all connected under one movement. This is bigger than a stream.

HOT MAMA'S
KITCHEN
Lead Investor · Partner

Hot Mama's Kitchen brings the heat — literally. Rice mixes, rubs, marinades, hot sauces, and fish fry breading that'll change how you cook. Real flavors from a real one who believed in Tam2Real from day one.

🌶️ Hot Sauces 🍗 Rubs & Marinades 🍚 Rice Mix
Check Em Out ↗
TECHBRIDGE
ASSIST
Tech Partner · Investor

TechBridge Assist brings phone & computer services to those who need it most — plus website and digital creation services for business owners ready to level up. The tech backbone behind the Tam2Real operation.

💻 Computer Services 📱 Phone Repair 🌐 Web Design
Check Em Out ↗
TAMONLY
PANS 🔥
Summer Partner · Live Culture

Food for the soul, love for the ladies. TamOnly Pans brings the Jamaican side of the Tam2Real ecosystem to life — authentic plates, live cultural events, and a vibe you can't get anywhere else. Summer 2026 is gonna be different.

🍽️ Plate Orders 🎉 Live Events 🇯🇲 Jamaican Culture ☀️ Summer 2026

FAQ

GOT QUESTIONS?
WE GOT ANSWERS

Whether you're looking to launch a brand, join the network, or learn how to trade — this is your starting point.

🔨 BUILDING YOUR BRAND OR BUSINESS
Can Tam2Real help me start or launch my business?+
Yes — that's exactly what TamBuilds is for. We help small businesses and creators get a real digital presence: websites, social strategy, content, and brand identity. Whether you have an idea or you're already running something and need a boost, we can help you build it properly from the ground up.
What services does TamBuilds Agency offer?+
TamBuilds handles websites, brand identity, content strategy, social media setup, and digital marketing for small businesses. We also do custom proposals based on your goals — no cookie-cutter packages. Hit the TamBuilds page, check the pricing sheet, and reach out for a free consultation.
How much does it cost to work with TamBuilds?+
Pricing depends on scope — a basic website setup runs differently than a full brand build with ongoing content. Check the pricing sheet on the TamBuilds page for a clear breakdown, or request a free proposal and we'll tailor it to exactly what you need.
I have an idea but don't know where to start. Can you help?+
100%. Starting from zero is actually the best place to be — nothing to undo, everything to build. TamBuilds will walk you through naming, branding, setting up your online presence, and getting your first customers or audience. Reach out through the agency page and let's figure it out together.
⧁ JOINING THE TAM2REAL NETWORK
What is the Tam2Real Network?+
The Tam2Real Network is a connected ecosystem of brands, investors, and creators operating under one vision. It includes Tam2Real (the flagship — gaming, trading, crypto), Hot Mama, Next LVL, Niko Tha Barber, Highly Elevated, and partner agencies. Each lane is independent but moves together.
How do I become part of the network?+
Network spots aren't open to everyone — they're for serious operators who are building something real. If you think your business or brand fits the ecosystem, reach out through the agency page or connect on social. Network investors and partners are added by direct relationship, not a form.
What does being a network investor mean?+
Network investors are brands and businesses connected to the Tam2Real ecosystem — cross-promoted across streams, social media, and the website. It's not passive; everyone in the network is expected to be building. The benefit is reach, credibility, and being part of a team that's actually growing.
₿ TRADING & CRYPTO BASICS
When do you go live?+
Every day at 4:45 PM on Twitch and YouTube. Streams include live trades, community events, crypto chart analysis, and Blox Fruits gameplay.
What is Trader University?+
Trader University bridges gaming and real financial education. Learn crypto trading, chart analysis, and AI tools — in a way that actually makes sense for the next generation. Hit the Trader U page or download the free resources to get started.
Is this just Blox Fruits or real trading too?+
Both. Tam2Real started with Blox Fruits but the vision is bigger — crypto, charting, AI tools, and real financial education for the next gen. Gaming is the gateway, real trading is the destination.
I'm new to crypto — where do I start?+
Download the free Crypto Cheat Sheet on the Trader University page — it covers wallets, DCA strategy, market cycles, and key terms in plain language. Then watch the live streams to see real trades happen in real time. Start with knowledge, not FOMO.
How do I get a community trade?+
2 of 5 daily trades go to the community. Join the Discord and follow the live stream — make your offer in chat during the community trade segment.
